title: Contracts for Difference (CfD) Allocation Round 7: administrative strike prices methodology note
body: "This document explains the methodology used to determine the administrative strike prices (ASPs) for the Contracts for Difference (CfD) Allocation Round 7 (AR7).  The auction will be held on a pay-as-clear basis, subject to no project receiving a higher strike price than its technology-specific ASP. The ASPs therefore act as a cap on the level of support available to each technology.  "
